description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, urban design. The headband is wide and padded, finished in matte black, and connects to two large, circular ear cups. The ear cups are predominantly black with a vibrant green accent ring and feature a mesh-like texture on the outer surface, along with a small, stylized green face logo at the center. The ear pads appear thick and cushioned, likely made from synthetic leather or foam for comfort during extended use. The headphones have a robust, closed-back construction, suggesting good noise isolation. The overall build and color scheme give it a stylish, tech-forward appearance suitable for use in public urban environments.
description: A pair of black and green over-ear headphones with padded ear cups and a wide, cushioned headband. The ear cups feature a green accent ring and a small face logo.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the wide, padded headband and the circular ear cup with a green accent and face logo.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both ear cups, the thick padding, and the full arch of the headband.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view similar to view 0, highlighting the underside of the headband and the ear cup details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the headband and the outer sides of the ear cups with green accents.
